reviews.review_description: Seems like a very nice twist on vr chess. Its a bit wierd that this game doesnt have online multiplayer option up and running because there is a FREE chess app also in development and the multiplayer works fine on that app. Seems like a waste of money. I might ask for a refund within 12 days if no progress is made

developer_response.body:
We understand your disappointment with our VR chess game and appreciate your feedback. We are committed to improving the quality and user experience of our product. As for the multiplayer feature, we currently do not offer an online matchmaking  option as it requires additional security measures to prevent inappropriate behavior from online players. However, we do offer the option to play with friends. We apologize for any delays in fixing issues or adding new content to the game, as they are due to delays caused by our new project and the majority of our team graduating from their universities. We understand that the cost of the game may seem high, but it is intended more as a way to support the game's creators rather than its value. If the product does not meet your expectations, we recommend taking advantage of the store's refund policy. Meta provides all the tools to do so. 
Thank you for your feedback and support.

Best regards,
DoeButchersGames Team
